source: Smelling Salts Review — extracted from conversation history lines 76-78, 81-82
name: The Song Moment — End-to-End Technical Flow
description: The Song Moment is the emotional peak of Ruby Red's first encounter with Maven. Grace has been listening to Ruby's story — her struggles, her kids, her neighborhood. At the end of the conversation, Grace asks permission to sing Ruby a personalized song. The song reflects everything Grace just learned. Ruby goes from 'this is a chatbot' to 'this AI sees me.' The Song Moment is not entertainment. It is medicine.

seven_mechanisms.description: The Ruby Anthem is not a music app. It is a seven-mechanism behavioral intervention system.

mechanisms.description: The song tells Ruby's story back to her, reframing her struggle as strength
The Morning Anthem becomes a daily ritual — cue, routine, reward
Ruby creates her own anthem — autonomy, competence, relatedness
Music activates emotional processing centers that conversation alone cannot reach
The song is a gift. Ruby feels compelled to reciprocate — by staying, by engaging, by sharing
Gift Anthems come from trusted friends — the most powerful form of social proof
Ruby did not expect a song. The unexpected gift creates an outsized emotional response

step_1_conversation.description: Grace has a natural conversation with Ruby, collecting emotional data points
data_collected: Season of life (young mom, single parent, caregiver, etc.)
step_1_conversation.technology: Grace AI conversation engine with relationship memory

step_2_lyric_generation.description: Grace generates personalized lyrics based on the conversation
step_2_lyric_generation.inputs: Emotional data points from conversation + 40+ mapped Ruby Red struggle contexts
step_2_lyric_generation.technology: LLM-based lyric generation with Ruby Red persona constraints
struggle_contexts_mapped: Putting Something Back in the Grocery Line

step_3_music_generation.description: Lyrics are converted to a full song with music
step_3_music_generation.output: Full audio file (MP3) with vocals and instrumentation
step_3_music_generation.style_options: Matched to Ruby's emotional state — uplifting, reflective, empowering

step_4_presentation.description: Grace presents the song to Ruby
step_4_presentation.grace_script: I've been thinking about everything you told me today. Can I do something special for you? I wrote you a song.
step_4_presentation.player_interface: Custom audio player with lyrics display, share button, and save option
step_4_presentation.technology: Web audio player with Grace avatar animation

step_5_share_and_gift.description: Ruby can share her song or send a Gift Anthem to someone she cares about
step_5_share_and_gift.gift_anthem_flow: Grace suggests: 'Would you like me to make a song for someone you care about? A friend, a sister, a neighbor?'
step_5_share_and_gift.growth_loop: Every Gift Anthem sent is a silent Maven invitation — the recipient receives a beautiful song with a soft CTA to create their own

song_studio_features.morning_anthem: Daily ritual — Grace plays Ruby's anthem each morning as a motivational start

connection_to_trojan_horse.toilet_paper_flow: Song Moment happens at Step 7 of the TP Trojan Horse — after address collection, before relationship lock-in
connection_to_trojan_horse.gift_anthem_flow: Song Moment is the core of EP-001 (Gift Anthem Dedication) — the primary Trojan Horse entry point
connection_to_trojan_horse.14_day_marketing: Song and TP Trojan Horses activate together on Days 4-7 of the 14-Day Marketing Strategy
